testsuite.name: Network Layer Integration

testcase.name: should aggregate health status from all components
should discover and transfer blob between two nodes
should track peer events across unified network

testsuite.system-out: 20:10:34.285 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketClientHandshaker13 -- WebSocket version 13 client handshake key: 7REYVsbaX64l9EmPs7gayg==, expected response: yYG8uEAFDNhfgGjmNQhCh1nAkAU= 20:10:34.314 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.maxCapacityPerThread: 4096 20:10:34.315 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.ratio: 8 20:10:34.315 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.chunkSize: 32 20:10:34.315 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.blocking: false 20:10:34.315 [nioEventLoopGroup-47-1] DEBUG io.netty.util.Recycler -- -Dio.netty.recycler.batchFastThreadLocalOnly: true 20:10:34.406 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- [id: 0x50ddf3e1, L:/127.0.0.1:62058 - R:/127.0.0.1:62073] WebSocket version V13 server handshake 20:10:34.408 [nioEventLoopGroup-45-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- WebSocket version 13 server handshake key: 7REYVsbaX64l9EmPs7gayg==, response: yYG8uEAFDNhfgGjmNQhCh1nAkAU= Connecting to: ws://127.0.0.1:60076 20:10:47.302 [nioEventLoopGroup-51-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketClientHandshaker13 -- WebSocket version 13 client handshake key: UItKcMD25LW5ES8EWTaBNw==, expected response: 4mGIBV27otF4LtpRB+/3CXquAu4= 20:10:47.315 [nioEventLoopGroup-49-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- [id: 0xc59f2bc6, L:/127.0.0.1:60076 - R:/127.0.0.1:60082] WebSocket version V13 server handshake 20:10:47.316 [nioEventLoopGroup-49-1] DEBUG io.netty.handler.codec.http.websocketx.WebSocketServerHandshaker -- WebSocket version 13 server handshake key: UItKcMD25LW5ES8EWTaBNw==, response: 4mGIBV27otF4LtpRB+/3CXquAu4= Connection successful
